hero.headline: Your front desk never sleeps.
hero.subheadline: Osppy answers your guests on WhatsApp in seconds — pricing, check-in, availability — at 3am if needed. No extra staff required.

proof.bar: Live in 15+ boutique hotels across Mexico

problem.headline: 80 WhatsApp messages a day. All answered manually. By you.
problem.body: Boutique hotel owners spend hours answering the same 12 questions. Pricing, check-in times, pets, parking, breakfast. Over and over. At any hour. Every slow response is a booking that goes to a competitor.

card1.title: Midnight messages
card1.body: Your guests don't have office hours. Neither does your phone.

card2.title: Brutal OTA commissions
card2.body: Booking.com takes 20% of every reservation. And then owns your guest relationship.

card3.title: Slow response = lost guest
card3.body: 70% of travelers book with the first hotel that responds. Not the best one. The first one.

solution.headline: Osppy answers. You rest.
solution.body: We connect Osppy to your WhatsApp Business number. In 30 minutes it's ready to respond like your best front desk staff — with your hotel's exact information, in your chosen tone, in natural Mexican Spanish.

card1.title: Response in seconds
card1.body: Not hours. Seconds. At 2am on a Sunday.

card2.title: Sounds like you
card2.body: Configured with your real hotel information. No generic responses.

card3.title: Escalates to a human when it matters
card3.body: Complaints, complex requests, and confirmed bookings go straight to your WhatsApp.

how.headline: This simple.
how.step1: We connect your WhatsApp Business number

features.headline: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

f1.title: Native WhatsApp
f1.body: No new apps. Connects to your existing number.

f2.title: Available 24/7
f2.body: Responds at 3am without you waking up.

f3.title: Real Mexican Spanish
f3.body: Not translated from English. Built for LATAM.

f4.title: 30-min setup
f4.body: We load your info. Done. No IT required.

f5.title: Smart escalation
f5.body: Knows when to send you the message. Won't bother you with trivial things.

f6.title: No commissions
f6.body: Flat monthly fee. Whatever you save on OTAs is yours.

pricing.headline: One flat price. No commissions. No surprises.
pricing.comparison: Booking.com charges a mid-size hotel ~$3,000 USD/month in commissions. Osppy costs $149.

pilot.headline: What our hotel owners say.
pilot.body: Over 15 boutique hotels across Mexico use Osppy every day.

r1.quote: I used to answer messages at midnight every day. Now I sleep. Osppy handles everything with my tone and my hotel's exact information.
r1.author: Mariana R.

r2.quote: I thought a bot would feel fake. Not at all — my guests write to it the same way they'd write to me. And direct bookings went up 30% in the first month.
r2.author: Carlos V.
r2.hotel: Posada del Arte, San Cristóbal de las Casas

r3.quote: The ROI is brutal. I stopped paying Booking.com commissions on two room categories because Osppy captures those bookings directly via WhatsApp.
r3.author: Sofía M.
r3.hotel: Hotel Hacienda del Mar, Puerto Vallarta

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What happens if Osppy makes a mistake?
faq.a1: Osppy is configured to escalate to you when it doesn't have enough information or when it detects a sensitive situation. If it makes a mistake in a routine response, you can correct the information in seconds from the dashboard.
faq.q2: Do I need to change my WhatsApp number?
faq.a2: No. Osppy connects directly to your existing WhatsApp Business number. Your guests keep writing to the same number as always.
faq.a3: In 30 minutes we have Osppy connected and responding. We need your basic hotel information: prices, policies, schedules. We do the rest.
faq.q4: What languages does it respond in?
faq.a4: Mexican Spanish by default. It can also respond in English when it detects the guest is writing in that language. Portuguese coming soon.
faq.q5: Can I see all the conversations?
faq.a5: Yes. You have access to a dashboard where you can see all conversations in real time, intervene whenever you want, and review the full history.
faq.a6: No. Month to month. Cancel anytime. No fine print.

cta.headline: How many messages did you answer last night after 9pm?
cta.body: Book a 20-minute demo. We'll show you how Osppy works with your hotel's real information. No commitment.

success.title: Done! We'll be in touch soon.
success.body: Check your WhatsApp or email. We'll write to you within 24 hours to schedule the demo.

footer.tagline: The front desk that never sleeps.
